hypothesis: If non-negativity and sum-to-one physics constraints are embedded in the diffusion model’s loss, then it will generate composite formulations with higher physically valid and fabricable rates and equal or improved fidelity/diversity (higher Validityreg/Validityfab and Density/Coverage) than unconstrained CVAE and TabDDPM baselines because the constraints restrict sampling to the physically feasible composition simplex during denoising.
